response.content: Montgomery has seen a 12 percent reduction in property crime since 2021 according to the Crime Statistics dataset.
There are currently 47 active building permits in downtown Montgomery per the Building Permits dataset.
The Public Works department has the highest expenditure at 34 million dollars according to the Master Operating Expenditures dataset.
Crime incidents have decreased 8 percent year over year from 2022 to 2023 per the Crime Statistics dataset covering 2018 to present.
